title: APM: DOM-Based Attack via Dangerous JavaScript APIs
description: Detects DOM-based attacks using dangerous JavaScript APIs observed in browser telemetry spans. Monitors for document.cookie access, eval() calls, innerHTML manipulation, and location/hash-based injection in OpenTelemetry browser spans.
query: ('Log Source' = 'enterprise-crm-portal' or 'Log Source' = 'octo-drone-shop' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') and ((('Span Attributes' like '*document.cookie*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*document.domain*')) or (('Span Attributes' like '*eval(*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*Function(*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*setTimeout(*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*setInterval(*')) or (('Span Attributes' like '*.innerHTML*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*.outerHTML*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*document.write*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*insertAdjacentHTML*')) or (('Span Attributes' like '*location.hash*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*location.search*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*window.name*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*document.referrer*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate SPA frameworks using innerHTML for rendering
